---
title: "Publications"
---

## 2026 


## 2025

Houba N., Giarda G., Speri L. (2025). SlotFlow: Amortized Trans-Dimensional Inference with Slot-Based Normalizing Flows.
arXiv:2511.23228
[PDF](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2511.23228) | [Code](https://github.com/nhouba/slotflow-inference)


## 2024

## 2023
